name: cloudiqus-ops
description: Operations — health score, MSP reporting, renewal playbook, churn detection, partner scorecard, orchestrator.

skills.name: churn-detection
skills.description: CloudiQS churn detection — early warning signals, churn risk scoring, intervention playbook, and win-back sequences for churned customers.

skills.name: customer-success
skills.description: CloudiQS customer success playbook — 12-month post-launch engine, 28+ triggers, NPS collection, reference programme, and advocacy development.

skills.name: health-score
skills.description: CloudiQS customer health scoring model (0–100). Tracks AWS spend, engagement, delivery, satisfaction, and renewal risk. Updates monthly. Triggers churn and expansion workflows.

skills.name: msp-reporting
skills.description: CloudiQS MSP reporting suite — Monthly Value Report, quarterly business review, AWS partner scorecard, and internal pipeline report. Formats, cadence, and recipients.

skills.name: orchestrator
skills.description: CloudiQS Orchestrator agent skill — produces the daily digest at 08:00, coordinates all other agents, monitors SLAs, and surfaces the top 3 actions for Steve each morning.

skills.name: partner-scorecard
skills.description: CloudiQS AWS Partner Scorecard — tracks tier requirements, competency health, certification headcount, ACE quality, and MDF utilisation. Updated quarterly.

skills.name: renewal-playbook
skills.description: CloudiQS MSP renewal playbook. Timeline from R-180 to R+0. Commercial conversation triggers, expansion bundle, and escalation if at risk.

commands.name: churn-risk
commands.description: Identify customers at churn risk and produce intervention plan.

commands.name: health-review
commands.description: Run monthly health score review for all CloudiQS MSP customers. Flags amber/red and triggers appropriate actions.

commands.name: monthly-report
commands.description: Produce the CloudiQS monthly business report — MRR, pipeline, funding received, top 3 priorities.

commands.name: partner-scorecard
commands.description: Produce the CloudiQS AWS Partner Scorecard — tier requirements, competency health, certification status, ACE quality.

commands.name: renewal
commands.description: Run the renewal playbook for a specific customer. Timeline, expansion bundle, risk assessment.
